disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe throbbing whole-head headache that has not eased despite paracetamol, come on over the last few hours
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the headache — how bad is it and has anything helped?
Have you taken anything for it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a really severe pounding headache all over my head. I took paracetamol a while ago and it hasn't touched it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New breathlessness on minimal exertion and when lying flat, over about a week, in a person not previously breathless
trigger_question_examples: When did the breathlessness start and what brings it on?
Can you lie flat, or does that make it worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's come on over the last week. I get breathless just walking to the bathroom, and if I lie flat I can't breathe — I have to sit up.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A home blood-pressure cuff read markedly high this evening
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a home blood-pressure machine? What did it read?
Have you checked your blood pressure tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, my home machine said 175 over 100 tonight. That's higher than my usual.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Regular antihypertensive medication has been missed for the past three days
trigger_question_examples: Have you been taking your blood-pressure tablet as usual?
When did you last take your medication?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've actually missed my blood-pressure tablet for the last three days — I keep forgetting.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Witnessed loud snoring with episodes of stopping breathing and gasping at night, plus heavy daytime sleepiness
trigger_question_examples: How do you sleep — any snoring or pauses in breathing at night?
Are you sleepy during the day?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My spouse says I snore really loudly and sometimes stop breathing and gasp. I'm exhausted and sleepy all day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Both lower legs are swollen and tight
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any swelling in your legs?
When did the leg swelling start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both my legs are swollen and feel tight and heavy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long history of central weight gain with an increasing waist, and a chronic heavy full feeling under the right ribs
trigger_question_examples: Has your weight or waist size changed over time?
Any discomfort in your tummy or under your ribs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've put on a lot of weight around my middle over the years, and I get a heavy, full feeling under my right ribs.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dark, thickened, velvety skin patches on the back of the neck and in the armpits (patient describes the appearance, not a diagnosis)
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes to the skin on your neck or armpits?
Can you show me the skin on the back of your neck on camera?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, the skin on the back of my neck and under my arms has gone dark and thick and a bit velvety.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No sudden 'worst-ever' explosive-onset headache, no chest pain, no one-sided weakness or slurred speech, and able to speak in full sentences (pertinent negatives on targeted screening)
trigger_question_examples: Did the headache hit like a sudden thunderclap, the worst of your life in seconds?
Any chest pain, face droop, arm weakness or trouble speaking?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it built up rather than exploding all at once, and it's not the very worst ever in a split second. No chest pain, no weakness or trouble talking.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't think so — it's just a really bad headache and the breathing.
